nasb.text: When they had been released, they went to their own companions and reported all that the chief priests and the elders had said to them.

esv.text: When they were released, they went to their friends and reported what the chief priests and the elders had said to them.

cnv.text: 彼得和約翰被釋放了之後，回到自己的人那裡去，把祭司長和長老說的一切，都告訴他們。

ccb.text: 彼得和约翰被释放之后，就去找其他信徒，把祭司长和长老的话都告诉大家。

csbs.text: 彼得和约翰被释放了，就回到自己的人那里，把祭司长们和长老们所说的话都告诉他们。
